title: Level in progress (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level in progress}} {{Joke}}
{{Class 5|hexagon=6|color-l=20%|color-s=25%|color-h=12|class=6|safety=Extremely Unsafe|entity=Severe Entity Infestation|security=Unstable}} Level ██ is the furthest level from the earth and the most dangerous. The existence of this level is all liminal spaces, containing horrible and unbearable monsters. No wanderer has been able to survive the level... the only thing that is known about the level is The levels entities Are Very Dangerous according to dead wanderers. Its danger and power are scaled from 1 to 2; 2 means death. [[File:Level_10506070809000.png|thumb|Photography of level ██, photographer confirmed dead.]] '''W.I.P''' ==Colonies and Outposts== ==Entrances== *The correct key in the hub will lead u her. ==Exits== *Exiting this level will lead you to real life. ([The Frontrooms]]) ==Trivia==
